verdict.outlook: indexes range-bound, volatility normal, offensive sectors leading → constructive. Expect follow-through; favor longs and breakouts.

candlestick_patterns.description: Bullish Engulfing — buyers completely overwhelmed sellers
Hammer — long lower shadow, bullish reversal signal
Inside Bar — compression; breakout direction = next move
Inside Bar — compression; breakout direction = next move
Bullish Engulfing — buyers completely overwhelmed sellers
Bullish Harami — small bullish bar inside prior bearish body
Inside Bar — compression; breakout direction = next move
Pin Bar — strong rejection of lows
Shooting Star — long upper shadow, bearish reversal signal
Pin Bar — strong rejection of highs
Bullish Harami — small bullish bar inside prior bearish body
Bullish Engulfing — buyers completely overwhelmed sellers
Inside Bar — compression; breakout direction = next move
Shooting Star — long upper shadow, bearish reversal signal
Bearish Engulfing — sellers completely overwhelmed buyers
